rationale: Proposed change to residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) is unrelated to §11.25, which governs marine cargo containers in international commerce. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 11.25. MARINE CARGO CONTAINERS USED EXCLUSIVELY IN INTERNATIONAL COMMERCE.
_note: No conflict; §11.25 addresses an entirely distinct exemption category with no connection to residence homestead exemptions.
